falafel-recipe-in-airfryer-comedera.name: Falafel Recipe In Airfryer
falafel-recipe-in-airfryer-comedera.original_name: Receta fácil de falafel en airfryer
instructions: Abre las lata de garbanzos, escurre el agua de la conserva y agrega la legumbre en una licuadora o procesador potente.
Peel the onion and cut into notebooks finely. He also steals his garlic teeth and cuts his onion. Cut the cilantro.
Agrega los vegetales a la licuadora junto al garbanzos.
Incorporates cumin, paprika, sodium bicarbonate, salt and pepper to suit. Also pour olive oil.
Procesa poco a poco hasta que todos los ingredientes se vayan triturando.
When you see a consistent mass being formed, put it into a bowl and amasa so that everything will be complete.
Prevent airfryer at 180 ° C
Fold your hands with a little oil and shape balls of the same size, then smash.
Put the croquetes in the bowl of the air frying and bordnea from 15 to 20 minutes till they are doradite.
When ready, turn off the air fryer and serve your necks with some cream or make a sandwich.
Enjoy!

family-style-fish-tacos.name: Family-style Fish Tacos
instructions: Place a rack in center of oven; preheat to 300°. Place 1 1½-lb. piece white fish in a 13x9" baking dish. Season all over with 1½ tsp. salt.
Trim and discard stems of 2 jalapeños, cut in half lengthwise, then coarsely chop. Coarsely chop three-quarters of 1 bunch of cilantro leaves with tender stems.

Transfer jalapeños and chopped cilantro to a blender or food processor. Add ⅓ cup vegetable oil and 2 garlic cloves. Blend on high speed until a coarse purée forms. Scoop out and transfer 2 Tbsp. sauce to a medium bowl (you’ll be building your pico de gallo in this.) Pour remaining sauce evenly over fish, spreading with the back of a spoon.

Bake fish until it flakes away with light pressure from the tines of a fork in the thickest part, 18–25 minutes, depending on the thickness of fillet and what type of fish you’re using. Start checking on the early end of things so it doesn’t overcook!

While fish bakes, work on the rest of your toppings. Quarter 1 pint cherry tomatoes and transfer to bowl with reserved cilantro sauce. Peel ¼ white onion, then finely chop. Add to sauce and toss to combine.
Cut 1 lime in half and squeeze juice of both halves into bowl. Season with 1 tsp. salt and toss to combine.

Shave off core of ¼ head of cabbage. Thinly slice crosswise into shreds and transfer to a medium bowl. Cut another lime in half and squeeze juice into bowl; season with salt. Toss with your hands to combine.
Cut remaining 2 limes into wedges for serving.

Run knife around pit of 1 avocado lengthwise to split in half. Open avocado. Using bottom half of knife, remove pit by securing the blade in the pit, then turning it sideways to release. Using a large spoon, scoop out flesh, then cut into thin lengthwise wedges. Transfer to a large platter or board. Season avocado with salt.
Arrange cabbage, pico de gallo, and remaining cilantro and lime wedges on platter as well.

Warm 24 corn tortillas or 12 flour tortillas one at a time over a burner set to medium heat until blackened around the edges in some spots, about 30 seconds per side. Keep tortillas wrapped in a stack in a clean kitchen towel to keep warm until serving.
Using a large spoon, gently flake apart fish into large irregular pieces and transfer to a plate. Serve fish along with all the accoutrements and your fave hot sauce for a DIY taco party.

fasting-cinnamon-beer-cookies-argiro.name: Fasting Cinnamon Beer Cookies

ingredients.item: 1 cup half seed oil and half olive oil
1 cup half seed oil and half olive oil

instructions: In a bowl, add the oil, sugar, beer, cinnamon, cloves, zest and soda and mix the sugar to melt.
Add the flower and gently ferment the dough. The dough must be soft and oily. Very malleable.
We make them in whatever shape we want and dip them into sesame automatically.
We put them in sheet metal.
Bake the fasting cookies in a well preheated evening at 160 °C in the air for about 25 minutes to brown.
In the middle of the baking, breaking up and down the baking pans for uniform baking.
Sprinkle themm with sesame (optional).

fasting-trunk-argiro.name: Fasting Trunk

ingredients.item: 400 ghalvas of bacal (cut into irregularly nick pieces)
400 ghalvas of bacal (cut into irregularly nick pieces)

instructions: Melt the finely chopped couverture into a ben marie over low heat.
After we melt it, leave it for a few minutes to become lukewarm.
In a bowl, add the tahini total.
Add the couverture and mix the mixture with a soft spatula until homogenized.
Allow it to cool complete at room temperature.
Add the halva coarsely chopped as well as the almonds and gently mix the iredients.
A mass is being created.
Put it on a membrane and roll with its shape.
Refrigerate for about 2 hours until it is cut.
Cut into slides and serve.
It's a delicate sweet or healthy snack that gives energy.

fermented-grape-soda.name: Fermented Grape Soda

ingredients.prep: divided (grate 1 tsp. at a time over 4 days)

instructions: A clean 1-liter plastic soda bottle with cap; cheesecloth

Stir 1 tsp. ginger, 1 tsp. sugar, and 4 cups water in a 32-oz. canning jar to combine. Cover jar with cheesecloth; secure with a canning jar band (without lid). Let sit 1 day out of direct sunlight at room temperature.
Stir in 1 tsp. ginger and 1 tsp. sugar and let sit 1 day. Repeat twice more. Mixture (ginger bug) should have bubbles throughout and release more when agitated.
After 3 days, purée grapes in a blender until smooth. Strain, pressing on solids (you should have about 4 cups juice).

Combine juice and ½ cup ginger bug in a large nonreactive bowl. Cover with cheesecloth; secure with a large rubber band. Let sit out of direct sunlight at room temperature, skimming white mold from surface, until mixture is slightly foamy and releases bubbles when stirred, 3–4 days. Strain into bottle, cap, and let sit at room temperature until bottle feels pressurized, about 1 day longer. Chill.
DO AHEAD: Soda can be made 2 weeks ahead. Keep chilled.

festive-pilaf-lezzet.name: Festive Pilaf
instructions: 1. Add hot water until you go over the pistachio with Badem and wait for 20 minutes.
2. Clean the water leaking and stripping the shells with your hands.
3. Wash the rice with plenty of water and drain the water.
4. Melt the butter in the pan and add rice.
5. roast for 5 minutes on the ground fire.
6.  Tavuk suyunu ilave edin.
7. Cook the stove jealousy cover until the rice grains were softened.
8. Eat dry apricots in the form of cube.
9. 10 minutes of waiting water in hot water with grapes.
10. Put paper kitchen towel on the rice, tightly close the cover.
11.  10 dakika bekletin.
12. Heat the olive oil in the pan and roast the almond, pine nuts and antep nuts for 2 minutes.
12. August Add grapes and apricots and roast 1 minute more.
14 July Add and mix several drops of lemon juice.
15. Transfer the rice to the service plate to be a hilly image.
16. Add and hold on roasted cookies.

fig-and-rosemary-cranberry-sauce.name: Fig And Rosemary Cranberry Sauce
instructions: Bring water, brown sugar, and maple extract to a boil in a non-reactive saucepan. Add cranberries and figs. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes. Add rosemary and cook until sauce is thickened, about 5 minutes more.
Carefully remove rosemary sprig and discard. Remove pot from the burner and let cool, about 10 minutes. Pour sauce into a bowl and refrigerate until ready to serve.

five-spice-short-ribs-with-carrot-parsni.name: Five-spice Short Ribs With Carrot-parsnip Purée

ingredients.item: A large dutch oven or oven-safe pot with lid

instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Season ribs with 1 1/2 teaspoons salt and 1 1/4 teaspoons pepper and let sit at room temperature for 30 minutes. Rinse one carrot and one parsnip and cut into thirds (no need to peel); reserve.

In a large bowl, toss short ribs with flour until evenly coated. In a large Dutch oven or other oven-safe pot over medium-high heat, heat oil. When oil is hot, add 3 or 4 short ribs and sear on all sides until browned, about 2 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate and continue working in batches to sear remaining short ribs. Pour out all but 1 tablespoon oil from Dutch oven and reduce heat to medium. Add tomato paste and five-spice powder and cook, stirring, until fragrant, 1 minute. Add wine to pot, scraping up brown bits with a wooden spoon. Bring cooking liquid to a boil, reduce to a simmer, and cook until liquid is reduced, about 10 minutes.

Add reserved carrot and parsnip chunks, broth, onion, garlic, reserved cilantro stems, bay leaves, and seared short ribs. Nestle the short ribs in the cooking liquid to cover. Bring the liquid to a simmer on the stovetop, then cover and transfer to the oven to braise for 2 hours. Uncover pot and continue to braise in the oven until beef is very tender and falling off the bone, 30 to 60 minutes more.

Meanwhile, set a large pot of salted water to boil. Peel and roughly chop remaining carrots and parsnips. Add cook carrots and parsnips to boiling water and cook until tender when pierced with a knife, about 15 minutes. Drain vegetables and return them to the pot. Add milk, butter, remaining 1 teaspoon salt, and nutmeg. Use an immersion blender, potato masher or a fork to blend or mash to desired consistency (it can be as smooth or chunky as you like). Taste and adjust seasoning. Place a lid on the pot and reserve until ready to serve.

When short ribs are done, transfer them from cooking liquid to a plate. Set a strainer over a large bowl, and strain cooking liquid. Discard solids and pour strained cooking liquid back into Dutch oven. Set pot over medium-high heat and simmer until liquid is reduced by half and coats the back of a spoon, about 10 minutes. Taste and adjust seasoning. Gently reheat carrot-parsnip purée.
Serve short ribs over carrot-parsnip purée, topped with its sauce and a sprinkling of cilantro.

flan-pudding-tart-teleculinaria.name: Flan Pudding Tart
instructions: Pique a massa folhada com um garfo. Unte uma tarteira com margarina e polvilhe-a com farinha. Forre-a depois com a massa folhada e reserve.
In a pot, mix the contents of the flan pudding sachets with the moreena flour, sugar, eggs and milk.
Wrap with a wire rod, add the creams and mix again. Take the medium light until it thickens, always stirring.
Lay the cream on the tart and put it in the oven, preheated at 200°C, until the surface is golden.

flourless-chocolate-orange-cake.name: Flourless Chocolate-orange Cake

ingredients.prep: cut into pieces, plus more for pan
chopped, plus more shaved for serving

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and preheat to 350°. Butter bottom and sides of pan with unsalted butter. Remove a wide strip of orange zest from 1 large orange with a peeler and set aside. Finely grate remaining zest from orange into a large bowl; add 1 cup (200 g) sugar. Using your fingers, massage zest into sugar until mixture is homogenous and fragrant, about 1 minute. Set orange sugar aside.

Cut orange in half and squeeze 2 Tbsp. juice into a medium saucepan. Add 8 oz. bittersweet or semisweet chocolate, chopped, and 10 Tbsp. unsalted butter, cut into pieces. Place over medium heat and cook, stirring constantly with a heatproof rubber spatula and scraping down sides as needed, until melted and combined, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat and whisk in ½ cup plus 1 Tbsp. (45 g) unsweetened cocoa powder, 1 tsp. baking powder, and ¾ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Let chocolate mixture cool slightly.

Add 3 large eggs to reserved orange sugar and whisk to combine (you can use the same whisk without cleaning as it’s all going to the same place). Scrape in chocolate mixture and whisk to combine. Scrape batter into prepared pan and bake cake until risen and top is set, 28–30 minutes. Transfer pan to a wire rack and let cake cool in pan. Remove sides of pan.

Just before serving, whisk 1 cup heavy cream in a medium bowl to form soft peaks; mound on top of cake, creating decorative swooshes with spoon. Using a sharp knife, very thinly slice reserved orange zest strip. Scatter orange zest and shaved bittersweet or semisweet chocolate over cake.
Do Ahead: Cake can be baked 1 day ahead. Tightly wrap cooled cake and chill. Bring to room temperature before topping with whipped cream, orange zest, and shaved chocolate.

fluffy-cheese-bread-argiro.name: Fluffy Cheese Bread
instructions: Add the lukewarm water, yeast and sugar to the stringing bowls, mix to dissolve the yeast and leave until it is activated and foamed.
Add the flower and salt and mix with a spoon.
When the dough starts to collect, with the addition of flower, collect it in a ball by hand.
Empty it on a flowered surface and ferment for 5 to 10 minutes with strong moves with the finger tips.
The dough must be soft, elastic and supple.
Add a deep bowl and add the dough.
Cover with a fresh towel or membrane and place it in a warm place for 40 minutes.
After the doughrises, divide it into 15 pieces.
Create dough balls, flour knife or kitchen scissors and cut them in half.

fluffy-oregano-bread-comedera.name: Fluffy Oregano Bread
instructions: In a bowl, add flour, salt, yeast and oregano, mix and integrate everything very well.
Make a space in the middle, Volcano type and add butter and water. With the help of a spatula, mix well.
The mass will get a little dense, so use your hands to finish integrating and billing up to get a manageable texture.
Make your dough a ball, put it in a bowl and cover it with a little cloth. Let her rest for an hour.
After that time, you'll get your dough and divide it into 12 equal portions.
That's how you'll shape your loaves, as I told you, I like to make them round, but if you prefer them long and oval, there's no problem.
Put your loaves on a plate with waxed paper and leave a separation between the loaves and leave them to stand for 30 more minutes.
That's 10 minutes till the second lifting process's over, and you'll get your oven hot 180 degrees Celsius.
You'll bake your loaves for 20 minutes till they have a golden color and are very round.
Take them out and you have to let them stand and have them.
We're done!

forest-fruit-liqueur-with-an-orange-arom.name: Forest Fruit Liqueur With An Orange Aroma
forest-fruit-liqueur-with-an-orange-arom.original_name: Λικέρ φρούτα του δάσους με άρωμα πορτοκαλιού
instructions: First, we equalise forest fruits in the two sterile jars.
In a bowl, add the rum, vodka and sugar and mix well until it melts slightly.
Balance the mixture for the fruit liqueur of the forest in the jars by pouring it with the fruit.
Wash the orange and remove 2 pieces from its skin (only the yellow part).
Add 1 peel to each jar and then seal them well.
Leave the jars in a dark campnet for at least 1 month.
The longer we leave them, the nicker the liquor will get.
From time to time we simply shake them to dissolve the sugar that sits.
When the maturation time passes, we draw it and distribute sterile glass jars that close airtightly.
Maturation time: 1 month

fougasse-argiro.name: Fougasse

ingredients.item: 1/2 cup fresh yeast (12 g) or 4 g dried
1/2 cup fresh yeast (12 g) or 4 g dried

instructions: Dissolve the yeast and add it to a small bowl. Add 1/3 cup of total water and 1 full tablespoon of total flour.
Mix the ingredients with a spoon, cover the bowl and place in a warm place 20’.
In a bowl, add the flour, add the salt and mix.
Add the olive oil, water and yeast mixture.
Mix the ingredients to wet the flour and slowly ferment until they are collected from the bowl walls.
Remove the dough on the counter and ferment for 6-8 minutes until it becomes smooth and does not stick to the hands.
Add the chopped olives.
Place in a slightly oiled bowl and cover with membrane.
We leave it for an hour to swell. Discharge it and ideally put it back in the bowl, cover it and leave it in the refrigerator 1 night.
If you don't have the time, proceed with the process to bake.

french-75-cocktail.name: French 75 Cocktail
instructions: Using zester or paring knife, slice peel from 1 lemon in long, thin spiral. Reserve lemon for another use and set peel aside.

Combine 1½ oz. gin, ¾ oz. fresh lemon juice, and ½ oz. simple syrup in a cocktail shaker. Add 1 cup ice cubes and shake vigorously until well chilled, about 20 seconds. Strain into chilled Champagne flute and top with 2 oz. dry sparkling wine.

Curl reserved lemon peel around finger to create twist at least 6" long. Garnish drink with lemon twist and serve immediately. 

Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in June 2009. Head this way for more of our favorite gin cocktails →

french-toast-mini-dutch-babies.name: French Toast Mini Dutch Babies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Combine eggs, milk, flour, maple syrup, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg, and salt in a blender; blend until smooth and free of lumps, 1 to 2 minutes.

Cut butter into 12 equal pieces; place 1 piece in each cup of a 12-cup muffin tin. Place tin in the oven until butter melted, about 1 minute. Divide batter among the prepared cups. Place muffin tin on a baking sheet.

Place baking sheet in the preheated oven; bake until pancakes are puffed and browned on edges, 10 to 15 minutes. Remove from the oven; cool in the tin for 2 minutes. Run a knife around edges and bottoms of cups to loosen. Serve pancakes immediately.

french-toast-recipe-with-red-berries-com.name: French Toast Recipe With Red Berries
french-toast-recipe-with-red-berries-com.original_name: Receta de tostadas francesas con frutos rojos
instructions: Corta el pan brioche en rebanadas gruesas.
In a package or bowl, add the eggs and milk.
Also add vanilla, sugar and mix with a hand shake.
Remoja e impregna las rebanadas gruesas en la mezcla del huevo por ambos lados.
In a frying pan with medium heat melt butter and as hot place the slice of bread, cook up both sides, a couple of minutes on each side.
Serve and decorate with Red fruits, Maple Honey and sprinkle sugar and cinnamon to taste.

fresh-artichoke-olive-and-burrata-pizza.name: Fresh Artichoke, Olive, And Burrata Pizza
instructions: Heat oven to 450°. Squeeze juice from lemon halves into a bowl of water. Using a serrated knife, remove outer leaves from artichokes to expose heart. Trim 3" from top. Trim stems and remove tough outer layer with a vegetable peeler. Halve artichokes lengthwise and remove choke with a spoon. Dip in lemon water to prevent artichokes from browning. Thinly slice and place in a small bowl. Drizzle with 1 Tbsp. oil and toss to coat; season with salt and pepper.
Gently stretch each piece of dough into a 9" round and transfer to 2 lightly rimmed oiled baking sheets. (If dough springs back, cover and let rest 10 minutes, then stretch again, resting as needed).

Brush with remaining 4 Tbsp. oil; season with salt and pepper. Top with burrata, olives, artichokes, and rosemary. Bake pizza, rotating baking sheet halfway through, until cheese is melted and bubbly and crust is golden brown, 12–15 minutes. Top with lemon zest and season with more pepper.

fresh-tomato-salsa.name: Fresh Tomato Salsa
instructions: Stir tomatoes, onion, green bell pepper, cilantro, lime juice, jalapeño pepper, cumin, salt, and pepper together in a bowl until just combined.
Serve and enjoy!

frozen-cookie-dough-pie.name: Frozen Cookie Dough Pie

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract
Diamond crystal or  0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
. diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt
. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract

instructions: Place ½ cup (90 g) bittersweet chocolate chips in a medium heatproof bowl. Bring 2 Tbsp. light corn syrup, ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ cup heavy cream to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium, whisking occasionally. Pour over chocolate chips and whisk vigorously until chocolate is melted and mixture is smooth. Add remaining ¾ cup heavy cream; stir with a rubber spatula to combine. Cover ganache with a lid or plate and chill at least 1 hour and up to 12 hours.

Transfer chilled ganache to the bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the whisk attachment and beat on medium until medium peaks form, about 4 minutes. Scrape whipped ganache into one 10"-diameter store-bought graham cracker crust and smooth with an offset spatula or a spoon. Freeze (unwrapped is fine) until ganache is firm to the touch, about 1 hour.

Beat 4 Tbsp. unsalted butter, room temperature, ¼ cup (packed; 50 g) light brown sugar, 1 tsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract, and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in the clean bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on medium until very pale and fluffy, about 4 minutes. Add 2 Tbsp. whole milk and mix on low until combined (it may look curdled), about 1 minute. Scrape down sides of bowl, add 1 cup (125 g) all-purpose flour, preferably commercially heat treated, and mix just until incorporated, about 1 minute. Add ⅓ cup (60 g) bittersweet chocolate chips and mix, scraping down bottom and sides of bowl, until combined.

Scrape dough onto a large sheet of plastic and wrap loosely.
Roll out to ¼" thick, keeping contained in plastic. Freeze just until solid, about
1 hour.

Transfer dough to a cutting board; remove and discard
plastic wrap. Cut dough into ¼" cubes (they don’t need to be perfect). Transfer to
an airtight container and freeze until ready to use.

Beat ¾ cup heavy cream and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in the clean bowl of a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment on medium until medium peaks form; transfer to a small bowl. Cover whipped cream and chill.

Place 4 large egg yolks and ⅓ cup (67 g) granulated sugar in same stand mixer bowl (no need to wash) and whisk by hand to vigorously combine. Place bowl over a small saucepan of gently simmering water (make sure bowl does not touch water) and cook, whisking constantly, until sugar is dissolved and mixture is warm to the touch, 6–8 minutes. Remove from heat and fit bowl on stand mixer. Attach whisk and beat egg mixture on high speed until very light, thick, and room temperature, 5–7 minutes. Whisk in 1 Tbsp. crème de cacao and 1 Tbsp. vanilla bean paste or vanilla extract. Add one third of reserved whipped cream and, using a large rubber spatula, gently fold until combined. Add remaining whipped cream in 2 batches, folding to combine after each. Add cookie dough pieces and mix gently to incorporate.

Scrape semifreddo over ganache in crust; smooth surface with
offset spatula (crust will be very full). Cover with plastic wrap, pressing directly
onto surface, and freeze until firm, at least 6 hours.

When ready to serve, let pie sit at room temperature 10
minutes, then cut into 12 wedges.

Meanwhile, beat remaining 1 cup heavy cream and ½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt in the clean bowl of stand mixer fitted with whisk attachment. Pile whipped cream on top of pie, swirling to cover filling. Chill in freezer 10 minutes.

Sprinkle ½ cup chocolate puffed rice cereal on top to serve.
Do Ahead: Pie (without toppings) can be made 3 days ahead. Keep frozen.

fruit-chow.name: Fruit Chow
instructions: Toss pineapple, culantro, garlic, lime zest, and lime juice in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Let sit at room temperature at least 2 hours, or cover and chill up to 12 hours.
Just before serving, taste chow and add more lime juice and season with more salt and pepper if needed.
Use the silky shreds of roti to scoop up all the various curries, chows and chokas that make up this roti lime feast.

fruit-winter-cake-lezzet.name: Fruit Winter Cake

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon of fine grated lemon peel

instructions: 1. Break eggs to a large glass bowl.
2. Add sugar, melted and cooled butter, and add &ccedil with mixer.
3. shielded coated, carbonate, muskat, lemon peel and tarch in another container.
4. Add to the egg mixture and continue mixing with the mixer.
5. Add milk and lemon juice.
6. Reinde and other foods in the form of small pars.
7. Add to the mixture and mix it with wooden spoon.
8. 30-35 minutes in the oven heated above 175 degrees.
9. Serve your service.

frygadelli-argiro.name: Frygadelli
instructions: Fine chop the liver into small pieces and add it to a bowl.
Add the garlic, parsley, oregano, salt and pepper.
Heat the bowl in hot water to open and spread on a bench.
Remove and throw away the hard, fat parts of the pile.
Cut a knife into long pieces for our toasts.
Place on each piece of bowl from 1 tbs. filling along and give the toad shape.
We wrap them up. After making them all, fly them in a pan in hot olive oil 2-3 minutes on each side.
Turn them off with lemon.

keskul-u-fukara-recipe-lezzet.name: Fukara Recipe

ingredients.item: 1/2 cup of rice flour or starch
1/2 cup of water (from the point of view deerçired or finely accessible)

instructions: 1. Suede to a medium-sized pot; sugar into put and add.
2. Mix up to sugar in medium fire.
3. Pyrnç in a separate container; flew and 1-2 mins of cold milk mix and smooth mixture.
4. Add this mixture in hot milk.
5. Cook the mixture in medium fire until stirring with s&uuml.
6. It should be in the consistency of the scale.
7. After taking part, add juice, vanilla and rose water optional.
8. Cook it for 2-3 minutes.
9. Wait for the mixture to the bowls to come to the pour and room temperature.
10. Then cool at least 1 hour in the refrigerator.
11. 11. 11. 11. Without service before you can powder sprinkle antep peanut, cinna or fill powder.
12.  Afiyet olsun.
